Today we discuss the seven in-depth.
The executors who placed themselves above all else during the Orcans reign.
Those being Ballas, Tuval, Avantis, Neetok, Tarish, Skarn, and Tormus.

Although seven emperors are also mentioned, it is largely believed that these two groups are essentially one in the same, merely taking on multiple worthy naming conventions, being the unbridled rulers of the era.
And in the present day, they are thought to be each of them dead.
Although we may come to find in time that might not be entirely accurate.
As they are described, they are essentially the image for what corrupted power would look like in human form.
And in their case, they brazenly paraded this mindset around and were equally indifferent to how it was perceived amongst both their own subjects, but also the Orcan Empire as a whole.
All too willing to sacrifice anything for the most mundane of their desires.
The opinions of others, relationships, even lives should any of it be seen as an obstacle.
And after making the origin system a complete waste of depleted natural resources, while at the same time being heavily over-experimented on for all kinds of different purposes.

It's not hard to believe that someone or many ones would begin to have problems first following such tyrants, but when realizing they could not be removed from power peacefully, eventually with their very existence.
